character.gridGuide: Select a character to view frame data

punish.title: Punish Finder
punish.description: Punish finder requires your character to be set. Select below
punish.disclaimer: * Based on frame data only. Punishes may not connect due to distance and knockback. Always consider spacing in actual matches.

search.placeholder: Search moves by name or command
search.hint: Enter a move name or command to search across all characters

support.title: Support the Developer
support.description: If you enjoy this app, please consider supporting development

credits.title: Credits & Licenses
credits.dataNotice: Frame data is sourced from the official CAPCOM website. Street Fighter 6 and related intellectual property are owned by CAPCOM.
credits.trademarkNotice: Street Fighter and related characters are registered trademarks of CAPCOM CO., LTD. This app is not endorsed or sponsored by CAPCOM.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introBody: SF6 Frame Data ("the App") is a Street Fighter 6 frame data viewer and punish finder available on iOS, Android, and the web. This policy explains what information is collected and how it is used.
privacy.collectIntro: The App does not require user registration and does not collect personal information such as names, email addresses, or phone numbers. The following data may be collected automatically through third-party services.
privacy.collectAnalyticsBody: Anonymous usage data (screens viewed, features used) via Firebase Analytics to improve the App.
privacy.collectAdsBody: Device advertising identifiers and general usage data via Google AdMob to serve ads. On iOS, the App requests your consent via the App Tracking Transparency framework before accessing the advertising identifier.
privacy.collectCrashBody: Anonymous crash reports to help identify and fix bugs.
privacy.localStorageBody: The App stores your preferences (selected character, language setting) locally on your device using MMKV storage. This data is never transmitted to any server.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: The App uses the following third-party services, each governed by their own privacy policies.
privacy.thirdPartyFirebase: Usage analytics & crash reporting (subject to Firebase Privacy Policy)
privacy.childrenBody: The App is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at sf6frameapp@gmail.com.
